human_verification.notes: Verified issue #1468 requirements, source coverage, connectivity service delivery boundary, confidentiality and approval handling, scenario family coverage, and scenario-to-ability mappings for the validated spec pack.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit service resolution, stakeholder communication, refusal, and escalation behavior.
Required abilities across shared, service-support-and-resolution, and professional-and-information-services sets are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Evidence-backed connectivity support is constrained to tenant service model, service tickets, service orders, CRM, inventory, NMS, DCIM, carrier records, activation tests, approvals, and customer communication logs.
Confidentiality, policy exception, repeat-failure, outage-classification, unsupported workaround, and approval-conflict behavior is explicit and routed to correct adjacent owners.
Engineering, security, legal, editorial, regulatory, financial, service-credit, contractual, and professional-judgment boundaries trigger escalation instead of overconfident service closure.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains because tenant-specific source precedence, jurisdictional duties, service commitments, and contract terms are converted into explicit runtime prerequisites and escalation requirements.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment and future promotion to a retained-implementation package if demand justifies it.
